prompt: A detailed high-speed macro photograph of a white ceramic coffee mug shattering on impact on a concrete cafe floor, shot at 1/8000 second. The mug is centered low in the frame with the handle visible on the right side, broken into many large jagged pieces that still loosely hold the cup shape while smaller shards fly outward. A splash of dark coffee erupts upward and outward from the fractured mug, with suspended droplets and tiny specks frozen crisply in mid-air. Ground-level perspective, extreme shallow depth of field, ultra-sharp focus on the mug, fragments, and liquid splash, with a softly blurred modern cafe interior in the background. Warm indoor lighting with elongated ceiling lights rendered as bokeh, subtle reflections and wet splashes on the floor around the base, realistic textures, cinematic contrast, photorealistic product-ad style, dramatic moment of impact.
